title: heliotropium zeylanicum subsp. paniculatum
intro: Heliotropium zeylanicum subsp. paniculatum is a plant species commonly known as the slender heliotrope or panicled heliotrope, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in various herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting digestive health. Heliotropium zeylanicum subsp. paniculatum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
